$comment: Tier definitions. Each tier has a slug (folder under tests/), a human-readable label, a difficulty class, and a score multiplier applied to every passing test's base points. The pass_fraction is the threshold for counting a tier as 'passed' on the scorecard (display only).

tiers.label: Basics
tiers.description: Add, commit, amend, log, diff, .gitignore, restore.

tiers.label: Branching
tiers.description: Create, switch, delete, rename, merge branches.

tiers.label: GitHub Issues
tiers.description: Create, comment, label, assign, close, link.

tiers.label: GitHub Pull Requests
tiers.description: Open, review, comment, merge, squash, draft.

tiers.label: Advanced Git
tiers.description: Interactive rebase, cherry-pick, stash, bisect, reflog.

tiers.label: Expert
tiers.description: Submodule, worktree, signed commits, history rewrite.
